aboutDiagnosticsFoldersIntro: Same folders as Tools → Open folder…. Hover a button for details.
aboutDiagnosticsToolbarAria: Diagnostics, logs, and temporary data cleanup
aboutDialogDescAria: Dialog with app and runtime versions; diagnostics, external documentation links, and close.
aboutExternalDocsNavAria: External yt-dlp and ffprobe documentation links
aboutFooterLeftGroupAria: Diagnostics links, external docs, and help article
aboutKnowledgeArticleRegionAria: Knowledge base article link about logs and diagnostics
aboutKnowledgeSupportArticleTooltip: Open the in-app article about logs, Support ZIP, and cleaning temporary files.
aboutModalFooterSplitAria: About dialog footer: actions and close
aboutTooltipLogsFolder: Open the app logs folder in the file manager — runtime logs and traces live there.
aboutTooltipMainLog: Open the main process log (main.log) with your default text editor or viewer.
aboutTooltipMaintenanceCleanAll: Delete all app-managed temporary data. First click shows a hint; second click while the button reads “Confirm…” performs the wipe.
aboutTooltipMaintenanceCleanFfmpegTemp: Clear ffmpeg temp files created during exports. Two-step confirm.
aboutTooltipMaintenanceCleanPartials: Remove unfinished yt-dlp .part / .ytdl artifacts in the download area. Two-step confirm.
aboutTooltipMaintenanceCleanPreview: Clear preview cache only. Two-step flow: hint first, then confirm.
aboutTooltipMaintenanceSummary: Show in the status line how much space preview cache, ffmpeg temp, and unfinished yt-dlp .part files use — no deletion yet.
aboutTooltipSupportZip: Build a diagnostics ZIP to a path you choose: versions, settings, paths. Handy for support or your own backup.
mediaUtilitiesHashesTitle: MD5 and SHA256 for the selected file (also written to main.log)
mediaUtilitiesHint: Remux repair (`-c copy`) and integrity scan without re-encoding (section 17).
mediaUtilitiesImageConvertTitle: Save image in the selected format
mediaUtilitiesImageHint: Single-frame ffmpeg export to JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Source: JPG/PNG/WebP/BMP/GIF/TIFF.
mediaUtilitiesImageNotImage: Pick an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, GIF, or TIFF), not video.
mediaUtilitiesIntegrityTitle: Run ffmpeg to stderr without writing a file
mediaUtilitiesNoiseHint: 44.1 kHz WAV via ffmpeg lavfi (white/pink noise or silence).
mediaUtilitiesPickFileTitle: Pick a video file for the operation
mediaUtilitiesRepairTitle: Save a stream copy without re-encoding
